assertions.title: Footer renders on all public pages

steps.observed: Homepage loaded successfully
Footer with company info, quick links, legal links, and trust banner visible at bottom

steps.action: Take screenshot of footer on homepage
steps.observed: Screenshot saved showing full footer on homepage
Football page loaded successfully
Footer with identical content visible at bottom of football page

steps.action: Take screenshot of footer on football page
steps.observed: Screenshot saved showing full footer on football page

assertions.title: Footer does NOT render on admin pages

steps.observed: Login form displayed with email and password fields
Logged in and redirected to /
Admin dashboard loaded with sidebar navigation and stats

steps.action: Scroll to bottom of admin page
steps.observed: No public footer present; admin page shows its own sidebar layout with Logout at bottom
Screenshot confirms admin page has no public footer

assertions.title: Footer quick links and legal links are present

steps.action: Navigate to homepage and scroll to footer
steps.observed: Footer visible at bottom of homepage

steps.expected: Quick links and legal links found
steps.observed: 6 links found: About, Help Center, Contact (Quick Links) and Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy (Legal)

steps.expected: All links are interactive link elements
steps.observed: All 6 links are rendered as <a> (link) elements with refs, confirming they are tappable
Annotated screenshot shows links labeled [49]-[54] with clear boundaries

steps.action: Navigate to homepage and scroll to footer
steps.observed: Footer visible at bottom of homepage
Fan Protect Guarantee banner visible with shield icon, bold title, and descriptive text
Banner has gradient background (from-primary-50 to-blue-50), border (border-primary-200), rounded corners, and shield icon - visually distinct from surrounding content
Screenshot saved showing trust banner with text: 'Every purchase is 100% protected. Valid tickets or your money back. Secure transactions backed by our buyer protection guarantee.'

assertions.title: Footer renders above bottom tab bar without clipping

steps.action: Navigate to homepage and scroll to very bottom
steps.expected: Footer and tab bar both visible
steps.observed: Footer content ends above the bottom tab bar, both are fully visible

steps.action: Verify footer has bottom padding for tab bar
steps.observed: Footer component has class pb-16, providing 64px clearance above the fixed bottom tab bar

steps.expected: All footer content visible above tab bar
steps.observed: Trust banner (last footer element) text is fully readable and not clipped by tab bar. Tab bar (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My) renders separately below

steps.action: Take screenshot of footer above tab bar
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms footer content is fully visible with clear separation from tab bar

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Footer renders correctly on public pages (homepage, /football) with company info, quick links (About, Help Center, Contact), legal links (Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy), and Fan Protect Guarantee trust banner. Footer does not appear on admin pages. Footer has pb-16 bottom padding ensuring content is fully visible above the fixed bottom tab bar with no clipping. No console errors observed.
